title: ResearchTaskSpec v1
description: Draft v1 schema for ResearchTaskSpec — the first-class input for a DeepResearch run. Includes task_started_at and dynamic lookback window support.

depth_tier.description: Research depth tier controlling pipeline complexity.

lookback_days.description: Dynamic lookback window in days. Evidence older than task_started_at minus lookback_days is considered out of scope.

task_started_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the research task was initiated. Defaults to current time.

db_path.description: Path to the SQLite database for the research run.

output_dir.description: Directory for JSONL artifacts and checkpoint files.

output_md.description: Path for the compiled final markdown report.

text.description: Inline source text to ingest before extraction.

source_file.description: Local UTF-8 source file to ingest.

web_query.description: Online query to search and fetch into sources.

max_results.description: Maximum number of web search results.

search_provider.description: Search provider to use for web queries.
